creator: tmdraney@yahoo.com
text:
It was a fresh installation of 7.0.  I rebuilt all of the ports twice.  

----- Original Message ----
From: Oliver Lehmann <oliver@FreeBSD.org>
To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org; tmdraney@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, November 30, 2007 1:56:53 AM
Subject: Re: ports/118321: x11-wm/xfce4-panel - Xfce4 panels crash in 7.0_Beta2

Hi,

have you tried rebuilding all yourr ports (all!) after you've upgraded
 to
7.0B3? This is a required scenario.

Greetings, Oliver
